title: geum helveticum
intro: Geum helveticum, also known as the Alpine Avens, is a perennial plant species in the rose family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce inflammation. Geum helveticum is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and acting as a natural diuretic. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
